parameters.name: Group Policy Identifier
parameters.description: The string identifying a stored access policy. The Group policy parameters (e.g. Start time and End time) have precedence over input parameters mentioned in actions.

parameters.name: Permissions
parameters.description: The permissions specified on the SAS (Values separated by comma).

parameters.name: Start Time
parameters.description: The date and time at which the SAS becomes valid (example: '2017-11-01T15:30:00+00:00'). Default = now().

parameters.name: Expiry Time
parameters.description: The date and time after which the SAS is no longer valid (example: '2017-12-01T15:30:00+00:00'). Default = now() + 24h.

parameters.name: Shared Access Protocol
parameters.description: The allowed protocols (https only, or http and https). Null if you don't want to restrict protocol.

parameters.name: IP address or IP address range
parameters.description: The allowed IP address or IP address range. Null if you don't want to restrict based on IP address.
